item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 3min Officials with Louisiana Economic Development say they've asked LIV Golf to give t
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 3min Officials with Louisiana Economic Development say they've asked LIV Golf to give them an answer by Monday about the status of the league's planned event there in June De nola.com 5 203

item.title: Betgolfworld: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 5min Don't agree with this. United desperately needed a season with little cup football to g
item.description:
Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 5min Don't agree with this. United desperately needed a season with little cup football to get a firmer footing in the Premier League. I was devastated at the time myself, but it was a godsend we weren't in the European Cup this year. They'll be better prepared next year hopefully Cita Alex Turk @TurkTalksFC · 1h Football is ultimately about moments and memories - and I will never forget this night.
But it is heartbreaking that this tie, as well as battering Athletic Club in the semis, ultimately meant nothing. How that final made me feel will haunt forever. 1 1 205

item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 9min Some thoughts on O’Neill’s speech….
Credit to him for addressing things
And facing
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 9min Some thoughts on O’Neill’s speech….
Credit to him for addressing things
And facing the music. Hasn't been something we've been used to commissioners doing in recent years. Of course they don't always answer the questions most want to know answers to, but by taking to the mic Mostrar más Cita Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 13h Scott O’Neil was on the LIV broadcast earlier and hit a number of topics. 1 8 1 mil
Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 11min A big thanks to everyone who came out to our Fife live show and to @TheHomeofGolf for the incredible hospitality. Andy Johnson y 2 más 1 6 1 mil
